description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a dark, low-pitched hip roof and a rectangular footprint, set on a grassy lot with a paved driveway and walkway. The facade features a mix of large windows and solid wall sections, with the front entry sheltered by a prominent overhang supported by columns. The exterior walls appear to be finished in a light-colored material, possibly stone or stucco, contrasting with the dark roof. The house includes a garage integrated into the main structure, visible from the front and side views. The rear of the house has additional large windows and a patio area, suggesting an emphasis on natural light and outdoor access. The overall design is clean and geometric, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functional, contemporary aesthetics.
description: A modern two-story house with a dark hip roof, large windows, and a sheltered front entry, set on a grassy lot with a driveway and garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry with an overhang, large windows, and the driveway leading to the garage.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the solid wall sections, garage door, and the continuation of the driveway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying additional large windows, a patio area, and the backyard lawn.
description_view_3: Right side view showing a mix of windows and solid wall, with the driveway curving around the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Sheltered main entry with overhang, columns, and a paved approach
